heading: Premium equalization payments; basis; aggregate amount; establishment of designated periods
label: 4054 Premium equalization payments; basis; aggregate amount; establishment of designated periods
notes: Amendments2012— substituted “Administrator” for “Director” in subsecs. (a) and (b).Pub. L. 112–1411983— substituted “Director” for “Secretary” in subsecs. (a) and (b).Pub. L. 98–1811973—Subsecs. (b), (c). redesignated subsec. (c) as (b) and struck out former subsec. (b) prescribing formula for sharing losses between Government and industry and permit necessary flexibility in loss sharing to take into account longer-term loss experience trends and to compensate for lack of precision in actuarial computations.Pub. children.label: a
children.text: The Administrator, on such terms and conditions as he may from time to time prescribe, shall make periodic payments to the pool formed or otherwise created under , in recognition of such reductions in chargeable premium rates under below estimated premium rates under as are required in order to make flood insurance available on reasonable terms and conditions.section 4051 of this titlesection 4015 of this titlesection 4014(a)(1) of this title

children.label: b
children.text: Designated periods under this section and the methods for determining the sum of premiums paid or payable during such periods shall be established by the Administrator.
